summary: Tested POST /api/championships/extract-gamesheet-stats endpoint for extracting player statistics from gamesheet URL. All 16 backend tests passed. Features verified: score extraction, teams list, G/AG/D parsing, Penalties X/Y to PM/PF, Direct Free Hits X/Y to LDM/LDF, cards parsing, player name normalization (© removal), technical staff skipping, validation (PM/PF/LDM/LDF >= 0), and translation keys in 5 languages.

extract_home_away_score.description: Extracts home_score=7 and away_score=2 from mock gamesheet

extract_teams_list.description: Extracts teams: HC SINTRA, UD VILAFRANQUENSE

parse_goals_assists_defenses.description: G, AG, D parsed as integers (João Silva: G=3, AG=1, D=10)

parse_penalties_xy_format.description: Penalties X/Y parsed to PM (scored) and PF (failed). Salvador: 1/1 → PM=1, PF=0. Lourenço: 1/2 → PM=1, PF=1

parse_direct_free_hits_xy_format.description: Direct Free Hits X/Y parsed to LDM (scored) and LDF (failed). Lourenço: 1/3 → LDM=1, LDF=2

parse_cards.description: Yellow, blue, red cards parsed correctly (Lourenço: yellow=1, João: blue=1, Player2: red=1)

normalize_player_name_captain_marker.description: Captain marker © removed from player names (Salvador Madaleno © → Salvador Madaleno)

skip_technical_staff.description: Technical staff (T, T2, MAS, MEC, D) skipped - Coach Name not in players list

validation_non_negative.description: PM >= 0, PF >= 0, LDM >= 0, LDF >= 0 validated for all players

player_data_structure.description: All players have required fields: player_name, team, jersey_number, G, AG, D, PM, PF, LDM, LDF, yellow, blue, red

graceful_degradation_invalid_url.description: Invalid/unreachable URL returns empty result (200 with null scores, empty teams/players)

player_team_assignment.description: Players correctly assigned to teams (Salvador → HC SINTRA, GR1 → UD VILAFRANQUENSE)

translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.G: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Golos, ES: Goles, FR: Buts, IT: Gol, EN: Goals)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.AG: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Assistências, ES: Asistencias, FR: Passes décisives, IT: Assist, EN: Assists)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.D: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Defesas, ES: Paradas, FR: Arrêts, IT: Parate, EN: Saves)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.PM: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Penáltis Marcados, ES: Penaltis Marcados, FR: Pénalités Marqués, IT: Rigori Segnati, EN: Penalties Scored)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.PF: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Penáltis Falhados, ES: Penaltis Fallados, FR: Pénalités Ratés, IT: Rigori Sbagliati, EN: Penalties Missed)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.LDM: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Livres Diretos Marcados, ES: Libres Directos Marcados, FR: Coups francs Marqués, IT: Tiri Diretti Segnati, EN: Direct Free Hits Scored)
translation_keys_verified.championships.statHeaders.LDF: Present in all 5 languages (PT: Livres Diretos Falhados, ES: Libres Directos Fallados, FR: Coups francs Ratés, IT: Tiri Diretti Sbagliati, EN: Direct Free Hits Missed)

endpoints_tested: POST /api/championships/extract-gamesheet-stats - Extract player stats from gamesheet URL

critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint correctly parses APL-style gamesheet HTML table structure
X/Y format parsing correctly calculates scored (X) and failed (Y-X) values
Technical staff filtering by jersey number (T, T2, MAS, MEC, D) works
Validation assertions ensure PM/PF/LDM/LDF are non-negative
Graceful degradation for invalid URLs returns empty result instead of error
All 5 language translations for statHeaders are complete
seed_data_creation: Used mock gamesheet HTML at http://localhost:9999/mock_gamesheet.html for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamesheet stats extraction endpoint fully tested. All 16 tests pass. Mock gamesheet server running at localhost:9999. Endpoint parses APL-style HTML tables with multilingual header detection. X/Y format for penalties and direct free hits correctly parsed to scored/failed values. Translation keys for statHeaders present in all 5 languages (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN).

mocked_apis.mock_gamesheet_html: MOCKED - Mock gamesheet HTML server at http://localhost:9999/mock_gamesheet.html
